eaip:DocumentMeta.eaip:Title: Enterprise AI Agent Interoperability Protocol (EAIP) — Technical Specification
eaip:DocumentMeta.eaip:Abstract: This specification defines the mandatory transport, identity, and state-management requirements for secure, stateful, and auditable communication between heterogeneous AI agents across enterprise boundaries. It mandates gRPC as the sole transport layer, SPIFFE/SPIRE for workload identity, and the Recursive Context Envelope (RCE) for persistent session state.
eaip:DocumentMeta.eaip:StandardizationNecessity: Standardization is critical for ensuring interoperability between diverse AI agents, maintaining security through zero-trust identities, and enabling auditable, reproducible decision-making pipelines in complex enterprise environments.

eaip:Protocol.eaip:Name: gRPC
eaip:Protocol.eaip:Rationale: gRPC provides binary efficiency, native streaming support, and schema-first contracts necessary for agentic workflows. REST and WebSockets are explicitly prohibited for intra-mesh communication to minimize latency and ensure consistency.

eaip:IdentityLayer.eaip:IAMArchitecture: Leverages SPIRE (SPIFFE Runtime Environment) for automated identity issuance and mTLS-based authentication between autonomous agents.

eaip:EnterpriseAIProtocol.eaip:SequenceDiagram:
sequenceDiagram %% EAIP v2.4.1 — Full request lifecycle participant Client as Client Service participant Gateway as Inference Gateway participant SPIRE as SPIRE Agent participant Retrieval as Retrieval Service participant OPA as OPA Policyd
rect rgb(245, 245, 240) Note over Client,SPIRE: §2 Identity — SVID Acquisition Client->>SPIRE: FetchX509SVID() SPIRE-->>Client: X509-SVID Gateway->>SPIRE: FetchX509SVID() SPIRE-->>Gateway: X509-SVID end
rect rgb(240, 245, 245) Note over Client,Gateway: §1 Transport — gRPC/mTLS Channel Client->>Gateway: TLS 1.3 ClientHello (SPIFFE SVID) Gateway-->>Client: TLS 1.3 ServerHello end
Note over Client,OPA: §3 RCE — Envelope Construction Client->>Client: Construct RCE(depth=0) Client->>OPA: CheckPolicy(spiffeId=client) OPA-->>Client: PolicyDecision { allow: true }
Client->>Gateway: InferenceRequest(rce=RCE_depth0) activate Gateway Gateway->>Gateway: Construct child RCE(depth=1) Gateway->>Retrieval: RetrievalQuery(rce=RCE_depth1) activate Retrieval Retrieval-->>Gateway: RetrievalResponse(rce=RCE_depth1_response) deactivate Retrieval Gateway->>Gateway: Merge RCE_depth1 into RCE_depth0 Gateway-->>Client: InferenceResponse(rce=RCE_depth0_updated) deactivate Gateway
